liquibase.resource

Class OSGiResourceAccessor

  • java.lang.Object
    • liquibase.AbstractExtensibleObject
      • liquibase.resource.AbstractResourceAccessor
        • liquibase.resource.ClassLoaderResourceAccessor
          • liquibase.resource.OSGiResourceAccessor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable, Cloneable, ExtensibleObject, ResourceAccessor

    public class OSGiResourceAccessor
extends ClassLoaderResourceAccessor
